children.name:
Element should not have text "Status: not pushed" {By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Age')] and th[contains(text(), 'Sex')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]}
Element: '<button class="status btn btn-secondary" disabled type="button">Status: not pushed</button>'
Actual value: text="Status: not pushed"
Screenshot: file:/home/runner/work/PflbTeam3/PflbTeam3/build/reports/tests/1782762930942.5.png
Page source: file:/home/runner/work/PflbTeam3/PflbTeam3/build/reports/tests/1782762930942.5.html
Timeout: 10s

Element should not have text "Status: not pushed" {By.xpath: //button[contains(text(), 'DELETE') and contains(text(), 'HOUSE')]/following-sibling::button[contains(@class, 'status')]}
Element: '<button class="status btn btn-secondary" disabled type="button">Status: not pushed</button>'
Actual value: text="Status: not pushed"
Screenshot: file:/home/runner/work/PflbTeam3/PflbTeam3/build/reports/tests/1782762995618.6.png
Page source: file:/home/runner/work/PflbTeam3/PflbTeam3/build/reports/tests/1782762995618.6.html
Timeout: 60s
UI - Удаление дома через страницу All DELETE
